creator: lwhsu@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Stephen Roome from comment #0)
Hi Stephen,

If you still have access to the old account, please login with it and add a comment as a proof that you own both the accounts and approve for the maintainer transfer. And we can also merge the two accounts for you to keep everything in a single place.

If you don't have the access to the old account, please attach the ticket you want to update, and we can follow the procedure of maintainer-timeout, and maintainership takeover.
